headline: Cora is out at Fenway as the Patriots reload during the draft
morning_brew: Alex Cora is out, along with his staff. Ten wins and seventeen losses was the breaking point. I respect the run, especially that 2018 title that felt like a juggernaut, but this team needed a jolt and ownership finally pulled the trigger. Hope it works.

Naturally the bats decide to show up right as the manager gets his walking papers. Seventeen runs on seventeen hits against the Orioles is a joke. Garrett Crochet was lights out with six innings of three-hit ball and seven strikeouts. Willson Contreras drove in five runs, including a home run, but it is too little too late for the current regime.

Patriots draft recap time. Round 1, pick 28: Caleb Lomu, OT out of Utah. Drake Maye needed better protection all year. Love it, glaring need addressed. Round 2, pick 55: Gabe Jacas, EDGE out of Illinois. Interesting hire, we need the pass rush. Round 3, pick 95: Eli Raridon, TE out of Notre Dame. Head-scratcher, thought we had enough depth there. Round 5, pick 171: Karon Prunty, CB out of Wake Forest, depth at corner. Round 6, pick 196: Dametrious Crownover, OT out of Texas A&M, more help for the line. Round 6, pick 212: Namdi Obiazor, LB out of TCU, special teams help. Round 7, pick 234: Behren Morton, QB out of Texas Tech, another arm for camp. Round 7, pick 245: Jam Miller, RB out of Alabama, flyer on a back. Round 7, pick 247: Quintayvious Hutchins, EDGE out of Boston College, local kid staying home.

Playoffs are in full swing and the pressure is on. The C's are sitting on fifty-six wins and a two seed, looking to avoid the heartbreak we saw in the past. The B's have forty-five wins and are back at the Garden against Buffalo. We have eighteen banners and six Cups in this town, so anything less than a deep run is a failure.

trend_watch.trend: Six innings of shutout ball with seven strikeouts.
trend_watch.dans_take: Absolute dominance on the mound when we needed it most.

trend_watch.trend: Two hits and five runs batted in including a long ball.
trend_watch.dans_take: The big man finally found his swing in Baltimore.

trend_watch.trend: One clean inning with no hits allowed to close it out.
trend_watch.dans_take: Nice to see the bullpen not set the building on fire for once.

news_digest.headline: What's next for Alex Cora after being fired by Red Sox?
news_digest.dans_take: Alex Cora is out and it was a long time coming.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NFL draft grades for 32 teams: Winners, losers, steals
news_digest.dans_take: Kiper has his thoughts, but we'll see how these kids play on Sundays.

news_digest.headline: What could the Patriots trade for receiver A.J. Brown?
news_digest.dans_take: The rumor mill is spinning, but I'll believe it when I see it.
